title: Confirm and complete stack.json
description: Review package.json, tsconfig.json, and the build config to confirm the real framework version, language strictness, deploy target, database, and auth mechanism. Update stack.json to match.

acceptance_criteria.text: stack.json deploy_target is set to a real value (not 'none' unless confirmed)
Language and TypeScript strict mode reflect tsconfig.json
Any database or auth libraries are recorded
